title: Scaling First-Party Commerce Across D2C Brands
subtitle: Built a reusable commerce platform enabling multi-brand scale and owned-channel growth

points: Need to improve margins via owned channels
Multiple brands with shared commerce needs

problem.statement: How might we create a scalable commerce experience across brands while maintaining identity and speed of execution?

decisions.title: Standardized Commerce Backbone
decisions.problem: Multiple brands would lead to duplicated effort
decisions.decision: Created a shared commerce system with brand-level overrides
decisions.tradeoff: Reduced flexibility in early stages for long-term scalability

decisions.title: MVP Over Feature Bloat
decisions.problem: Time constraints and high pressure to launch

points: Established UX foundation for team expansion

takeaway: I build scalable product systems by balancing speed, constraints, and long-term growth.
